creator: ernst@jollem.com
text:
New port, the Linux JDK 1.4.0 (beta). It got released today, so I thought
let's get this thing in the ports tree *fast* :)

I tested that it does install and deinstall correctly, I fixed the
bin/.java_wrapper and the jre/bin/.java_wrapper scripts using 2 patch files
and I tested that `java -version' works as expected. The rest is up to the
testing team ;)

How-To-Repeat: N/A
